news.t: AllianceBernstein Launches Three New Active Equity ETFs on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: FWD is an equity ETF with a total of 121 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alliancebernstein Govt Stif Ssc Fund 64Ba Agis 587 stock at 6.62%, Advanced Micro Devices at 2.13%, Alphabet at 2.00%, NVIDIA at 1.96%, and Lam Research at 1.96%.

overview.description: The AB Disruptors ETF (FWD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of high growth stocks of companies considered to lead or benefit from societal innovations. Holdings may be of any capitalization, sector, industry, and geography. FWD was launched on Mar 22, 2023 and is issued by AB Funds.
